home-auto-desc: Professional support and independent advisory for buying and selling vehicles in Bavaria.
home-bau-desc: Premium tiling, expert interior renovations, and reliable relocation services.
auto-hero-title: Independent Advisory for Buying & Selling Cars
auto-hero-desc: I'll help you find a reliable car or sell yours at the best price. 100% transparent, no hidden fees.
auto-services-desc: Professional guidance for purchasing, inspecting, and selling your vehicle.
auto-services-page-desc: We provide professional and objective support at every stage of buying or selling a car — honest and market-oriented.
auto-svc1-desc: We find your ideal car: from comprehensive market research to on-site vehicle inspection and price negotiation.
auto-svc2-desc: I accompany you to the viewing on-site, inspect the vehicle thoroughly for hidden defects, and negotiate the best price.
auto-svc3-desc: Accurate determination of your car's real market value based on current data, giving you a solid negotiation foundation.
auto-svc4-desc: Professional preparation of your car listing: from high-quality photos and persuasive copy to the optimal pricing strategy.
auto-pricing-desc: Tell us briefly what vehicle you want to buy or sell — the first consultation is always free and without obligation.
auto-pricing-card-desc: Initial assessment by phone, WhatsApp, or email. We consult in English, German, Ukrainian, and Russian.
auto-why1-desc: Deep knowledge of the Bavarian automotive market and proven experience across numerous successful transactions.
auto-why2-desc: Fair terms without hidden commissions or brokerage fees. You only pay for the services you need.
auto-why3-desc: We respond promptly to your request and start researching or checking immediately — no long waiting times.
auto-why4-desc: No hotlines or call centres. You communicate directly with me as your personal advisor.
auto-cta-title: Want to buy or sell a car safely?
auto-cta-desc: Contact me for a free initial consultation — we'll help you quickly and reliably.
auto-leist1-desc: We assist you in finding the right car: from market research to detailed listing reviews.
auto-leist2-desc: Joint on-site vehicle inspection. We check paint thickness, electronics, and wear parts, giving you an honest verdict.
auto-leist3-desc: A data-driven valuation ensures you neither overpay nor sell your vehicle under its true value.
auto-leist4-desc: We create professional listings for you, select the best platforms, and advise you on negotiations.
auto-leist5-desc: Describe your request by phone or messenger — you will receive an initial appraisal completely free of charge.
auto-leist6-desc: We support you in English, German, Ukrainian, and Russian. A great relief, especially for newcomers to Bavaria.
auto-leist-cta-desc: Call or write to us — we'll be happy to advise you without any obligation or cost.
auto-about-page-desc: Learn more about Oleksandr Halushka — your personal contact for vehicle advisory and interior fit-out in Bavaria.
auto-about-intro-title: Founded Out of a Passion for Cars 🇺🇦
auto-about-intro-p1: I started this service to help people buy cars safely and securely in Germany — honestly, competently, and with no hidden costs.
auto-about-intro-p2: I operate as a sole trader (Einzelunternehmer) and always accompany my clients personally. If needed, I draw upon a network of trusted specialists and reliable partners. Honesty, market knowledge, and direct channels define us.
auto-about-intro-p3: Clients across Bavaria appreciate our fast response times, meticulous car checks, and direct personal communication.
auto-about-values-desc: These principles guide us on every single project.
auto-about-val1-desc: We point out vehicle defects or renovation challenges openly and directly. No unpleasant surprises.
auto-about-val2-desc: I work with modern diagnostic equipment and strictly adhere to technical and legal standards.
auto-about-val3-desc: A deal is a deal. We guarantee compliance with agreed dates, prices, and services.
auto-about-val4-desc: Whether a new client or a long-term partner — everyone receives the same dedicated, first-class service.
auto-about-tl1-desc: Started as an advisory service for vehicle purchases, particularly supporting the Eastern European community in Bavaria.
auto-about-tl2-desc: With a growing customer base, we opened our own office and expanded our range of services.
auto-about-tl3-desc: Added high-quality tiling and renovations to our portfolio — with the exact same high standards.
auto-about-tl4-desc: An established company in Bavaria for premium interior fit-out and professional vehicle advisory services.
auto-contact-desc: Write to me or call us — I will get back to you as soon as possible.
auto-contact-page-desc: Describe your project — whether car purchase, sale, or renovation. We'll be happy to provide an honest initial assessment.
auto-kontakt-info-desc: Choose the most convenient way for you. We usually respond to messages within an hour.
auto-form-intro: Fill in the form — I will get back to you as soon as possible.
auto-form-message-placeholder: Please briefly describe what you need or mention the model, year etc....
auto-faq1-q: How quickly will I get a response?
auto-faq1-a: I answer most inquiries within a few hours. At the latest, you will receive a reply on the next working day.
auto-faq2-q: What does the first consultation cost?
auto-faq2-a: The initial assessment by phone, WhatsApp, or email is completely free and without obligation. Costs only arise once we agree on a concrete on-site service.
auto-faq3-q: Which car brands does your consultation cover?
auto-faq3-a: We advise brand-independently on all common European, Asian, and American vehicle manufacturers.
auto-faq4-q: Do you perform inspections even without my presence?
auto-faq4-a: Yes, absolutely. We can inspect the car on-site independently for you and send you a detailed protocol including paint thickness measurements as well as photo and video documentation.
auto-faq5-q: In which languages is the consultation offered?
auto-faq5-a: We advise fluently in English, German, Ukrainian, and Russian. This ensures smooth communication without language barriers.
bau-hero-desc: High-quality tiling, professional interior renovations, and reliable relocation assistance in Bavaria.
bau-services-desc: From precise tiling repairs to complete, turnkey room renovations. We bring your ideas to life with flawless execution.
bau-svc1-desc: Flawless XXL large-format tiling, durable epoxy grouting, and bespoke bathroom designs tailored to your needs.
bau-svc2-desc: Expert installation of laminate, vinyl, and parquet, as well as highly durable, seamless epoxy resin floors.
bau-svc3-desc: Custom terrace design, professional drainage, and high-end natural stone laying for both interior and exterior spaces.
bau-svc4-desc: Professional fitting of interior doors, custom skirting board installation, and exclusive stair cladding.
bau-why1-desc: No crooked joints or uneven edges. I work with millimeter precision, paying attention to the smallest details.
bau-why2-desc: We carefully protect your furniture and flooring from dust and leave every room clean and tidy once my work is done.
bau-why3-desc: We strictly adhere to agreed schedules and completion dates — that is a matter of course for us.
bau-why4-desc: Inhabitant Oleksandr Halushka personally supervises every project on-site to ensure our quality standards are met.
bau-cta-title: Planning a Renovation or Construction Project?
bau-cta-desc: Contact me for a free on-site consultation. We will provide you with a transparent and binding offer.
bau-about-desc: We create aesthetic, durable, and comfortable living spaces in Bavaria, combining craftsmanship with passion.
bau-about-story-p1: Oleksandr Halushka's renovation and tiling business is founded on a simple belief: craftsmanship should not just be functional, but beautiful, durable, and inspiring every single day.
bau-about-story-p2: I work exclusively with qualified, experienced specialists — from professional tilers to careful relocation helpers.
bau-about-story-p3: Whether a minor repair in your shower or a complete property renovation — our promise of quality applies without exception.
bau-values-desc: High-quality construction work requires discipline, material knowledge, and honesty.
bau-val1-desc: We carefully plan joint layouts, transitions, and material connections in advance for a harmonious overall look.
bau-val2-desc: We keep you regularly informed about progress and discuss any adjustments with you in good time.
bau-val3-desc: A clean site ensures precise work. We keep dust and dirt levels as low as possible.
bau-val4-desc: We stand by my work. If anything is not to your satisfaction, we will correct it immediately.
bau-tl1-desc: Founding of the business specializing in high-end tiling and natural stone work.
bau-tl2-desc: At the request of our clients, we took on the coordination and execution of complete apartment renovations.
bau-tl3-desc: Expanded our offering to include furniture assembly and removals, providing clients with a true worry-free package.
bau-tl4-desc: Bringing together premium interior fit-out and automotive advisory services under the Oleksandr Halushka brand.
bau-leist-title: High-Quality Interior Fit-out from a Single Source
bau-leist-desc: Whether modern drywalling, creative wall design, or acoustic solutions — we implement your project on time and professionally.
bau-leist-cta-title: Would You Like a Custom Quote?
bau-leist-cta-desc: Arrange a free site inspection. We will advise you on-site and prepare a detailed cost estimate.
bau-contact-desc: Briefly describe your project — I will get back to you within 24 hours with first proposals.
bau-item-abdichtung-desc: Professional and certified sealing of wet areas to ensure reliable protection against moisture damage.
bau-item-grossformat-desc: Precise installation of large-format porcelain stoneware slabs for a modern, seamless, and elegant look.
bau-item-gehrung-desc: Filigree corner execution through precise edge grinding of tiles — for elegant edges without trim rails.
bau-item-spezial-desc: Installation of floor-level showers, niche lighting, epoxy grouting, and management of larger commercial spaces.
bau-item-epoxy-desc: Seamless, highly durable poured floors with a modern look — perfect for garages, basements, or living areas.
bau-item-laminat-desc: Floating or glued installation of modern design flooring including sound insulation and transition profiles.
bau-item-naturstein-desc: Professional installation and maintenance of granite, marble, slate, or travertine in interior and exterior areas.
bau-item-terrasse-desc: Creation of high-quality wood or WPC decking as well as slab laying on pedestal supports, including drainage.
bau-item-tuer-desc: Fitting of standard doors, frames, sliding doors, or flush-closing premium doors.
bau-item-sockel-desc: Clean cutting and mounting of wood, MDF, plastic, or modern shadow line skirting boards.
bau-item-treppe-desc: High-quality cladding of concrete stairs with tiles or natural stone for a representative entrance area.
bau-faq1-a: Yes, absolutely. Cost estimates and initial site inspections are always completely free of charge and without obligation.
bau-faq2-q: Do you work with fixed prices?
bau-faq2-a: We offer both fixed-price quotes and hourly rates, depending on the type, scale, and your individual preferences.
bau-faq3-q: How long does a typical bathroom renovation take?
bau-faq3-a: Depending on the scope, usually between 3 and 10 working days. You will receive a precise timeline directly with our quote.
bau-faq4-q: Do you have experience with large-format tiles?
bau-faq4-a: Yes, definitely. We specialize in XXL large-format tiles (up to 120×260 cm) and possess all the necessary professional equipment.
cookie-desc: We use cookies to optimize our website and improve your experience. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to the use of all cookies. You can change your preferences at any time.
